allow: PowerShell($env:PATH = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","User"\); Start-Process npm -ArgumentList "run","dev" -WorkingDirectory "E:\\nobeoka-gikai" -WindowStyle Hidden -RedirectStandardOutput "$env:TEMP\\vite-dev.log" -RedirectStandardError "$env:TEMP\\vite-dev-err.log"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; for \($i=0; $i -lt 20; $i++\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing http://localhost:5173 -TimeoutSec 2; if \($r.StatusCode -eq 200\) { "UP"; break } } catch { Start-Sleep -Seconds 1 } })
